---
title: "Recap: Final Presentation"
author: "Josh Goldhaber"
subtitle: "December 10, 2025 "
format:
  revealjs:
    self-contained: true
    scrollable: true
    slide-number: true
    show-slide-number: all
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---   

## Overview 

- **Text Analysis:**  
  Understanding thematic patterns and linguistic structure in Netflix titles and descriptions.

- **Permutation Tests: Silver vs. Gold Volatility:**  
  A permutation test examining whether silver is more volatile than gold from August–October.

- **Traffic Stops with SQL:**  
  Combining multi-city policing datasets, harmonizing outcomes, and analyzing citation/warning disparities.

## Text Analysis Recap
- Used **tokenization** to break down text into words.
- Removed **stop words** to focus on meaningful terms.
- Analyzed **word frequency** to identify common themes.

## Example code
